description: Create a CompEqStrip component showing all 6 units in a tabbed or stacked layout. Each unit shows: Comp section (switch, attack, release, threshold, ratio, output gain) and EQ section (switch, 3-band parametric identical to part EQ). Visible when the assigned drum part is selected and Comp+EQ is enabled.
title: Add Comp+EQ strip UI for 6 units
